title: Telegram Gateway configuration
description: Non-secret and legacy file-based configuration for Telegram Gateway. Secret values may instead be supplied at runtime through environment variables or file-backed secret variables.

telegram_bot_token.description: Legacy file-based bot token. Prefer TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN_FILE for container deployments.

telegram_chat_id.description: Optional default and authorized Telegram chat identifier.

port.description: HTTP port on which the gateway listens.

gateway_api_key.description: Legacy file-based API key. Prefer GATEWAY_API_KEY_FILE for container deployments.

webhook_secret.description: Legacy file-based callback signing secret. Prefer WEBHOOK_SECRET_FILE for container deployments.

routes.description: Map of callback_data prefixes to receiver HTTP URLs.
